markdown:
#  Why are my change order line items duplicated on my subcontractor invoice? 
#####  Note
This answer is applicable only when a [Commitment Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) or a Commitment [Potential Change Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) is created **before** the first subcontractor invoice on the project and the Subcontractor SOV tab is disabled. See [Enable or Disable the Subcontractor SOV Tab on a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-ssov-tab-on-a-commitment).
##  Answer 
For ERP synced projects, when you create a line item for a commitment change order (or a commitment potential change order, if using a 2-tier change order setting), and the "Line Item" section of "New Line Item" is selected, Procore creates the following items:
  * A new $0 line item on the commitment's (original) schedule of values (shown below).
  * A new line item on the change order for the actual amount.


![Comm](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c4506ddf23c9b052ac595ce45a2b34f/8aa9ce5006da5fba1b13758c446b7f4a/comm.png?fm=webp)
Since both the commitment's schedule of values and the change order's schedule of values are reflected on the subcontractor invoice, this line item appears twice on the subcontractor invoice:
  * In the (original) schedule of values section for $0 (line 2 below).
  * In the change order section for the actual amount (line 3.1 below).


![Re1](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c529831e15c0e68286820c56e262b33e/33bbe0d7cffa6f8d8c1511f168a115dc/re1.png?fm=webp)
There currently is no functionality in Procore that can hide that $0 line item from the subcontractor invoice. When creating a subcontractor invoice, the $0 line item should be disregarded and only the change order line item should be billed against.
## See Also
  * [How does Procore automatically complete amounts on an upstream invoice? (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-automatically-complete-amounts-on-an-upstream-invoice)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [How does Procore automatically complete amounts on an owner invoice? (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-automatically-complete-amounts-on-an-owner-invoice)
title: Why are my change order line items duplicated on my subcontractor invoice?
description: Learn about the conditions that lead to change order line items appearing twice on subcontractor invoices on ERP-synced projects.
